title: Xtra Tangy Croatian Eggplant Skillet
description: A tangy and silky solo dinner dish featuring eggplant and nuka pickle, inspired by Croatian cuisine, with a dash-friendly flavor profile.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the sliced eggplant and cook for 5 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chopped nuka pickle, paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the tomato paste and water, and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 10 minutes, until the eggplant is tender.
Stir in the chopped fresh parsley.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
Refrigerate and consume within 1 week — this preparation is not shelf-stable without an approved acid level and canning process.

Refrigerator pickle only: store in the fridge and consume within 1 week. For shelf-stable canning, add at least 2 tablespoons of vinegar (5% acidity) per cup of brine and follow a tested water-bath process.
